/usr/bin/c++  -arch x86_64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hyperelliptic_cpp.dir/hyperelliptic.cpp.o -o hyperelliptic_cpp   -L/usr/local/Cellar/flint/3.5.0/lib  -L/usr/local/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib  -L/usr/local/Cellar/mpfr/4.2.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/flint/3.5.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/mpfr/4.2.2/lib -lflint -lmpfr -lgmp -lsqlite3
